name: Triangle Area Function Call Generator
description: Parses user query to extract triangle parameters and generates appropriate function call for calculating triangle area
reasoning: This workflow needs to parse the user query to identify the triangle parameters (base, height, unit) and generate a function call with the exact structure specified. Using an LLM-based extraction activity will reliably parse natural language inputs and structure the output as required. The workflow uses a sequence pattern since we only need one activity to complete the task.
